ai_window_end_days_ago.description: Upper bound of the analysis window, in days before the run (0 = now). Required for 'days_ago_range' and must be less than ai_window_start_days_ago; must be empty for other modes. 0-365.

ai_window_mode.description:
Analysis window for AI report subscriptions. 'since_last_sent' (default) analyses everything since the previous successful delivery (gap-free); 'last_n_days' analyses a fixed trailing window of ai_window_start_days_ago days; 'days_ago_range' analyses the explicit range from ai_window_start_days_ago to ai_window_end_days_ago days ago.

* `since_last_sent` - Since last report
* `last_n_days` - Last N days
* `days_ago_range` - Between X and Y days ago

ai_window_start_days_ago.description: Lower bound of the analysis window, in days before the run. Required for 'last_n_days' (the N) and 'days_ago_range'; must be empty for 'since_last_sent'. 1-365.

bysetpos.description: Position within byweekday set for monthly frequency (e.g. 1 for first, -1 for last).

items.description:
* `monday` - Monday
* `tuesday` - Tuesday
* `wednesday` - Wednesday
* `thursday` - Thursday
* `friday` - Friday
* `saturday` - Saturday
* `sunday` - Sunday

byweekday.description: Days of week for weekly subscriptions: monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday, sunday.

count.description: Total number of deliveries before the subscription stops. Null for unlimited.

dashboard.description: Dashboard ID to subscribe to (mutually exclusive with insight on create).

dashboard_export_insights.description: List of insight IDs from the dashboard to include. Required for dashboard subscriptions, max 6.

enabled.description: Whether the subscription is active. Set to false to pause delivery without deleting. Auto-set to false when the delivery integration becomes invalid.

frequency.description:
How often to deliver: daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly.

* `daily` - Daily
* `weekly` - Weekly
* `monthly` - Monthly
* `yearly` - Yearly

id.description: A unique integer value identifying this subscription.

insight.description: Insight ID to subscribe to (mutually exclusive with dashboard on create).

integration_id.description: ID of a connected Slack integration. Required when target_type is slack.

interval.description: Interval multiplier (e.g. 2 with weekly frequency means every 2 weeks). Required on create; must be 1 or greater.

prompt.description: Free-text prompt that drives the AI-generated report. Required when resource_type is 'ai_prompt'. Max 4000 characters.

summary_enabled.description: Whether to attach an AI-generated summary to each delivery (insight and dashboard subscriptions only). Requires the organization to have approved AI data processing, and is subject to the org's active-summary cap and AI credit budget; otherwise the write is rejected. Not applicable to prompt subscriptions, which are themselves AI-generated.

summary_prompt_guide.description: Optional free-text guidance (max 500 chars) steering the AI summary, e.g. which metrics to emphasize. Only settable when AI summary context is enabled for the organization; clearing it (empty string) is always allowed.

target_type.description:
Delivery channel: email or slack.

* `email` - Email
* `slack` - Slack

target_value.description: Recipient(s): comma-separated email addresses for email, or Slack channel name/ID for slack.

until_date.description: When to stop delivering (ISO 8601 datetime). Null for indefinite.
